name: Green on Green Pasta Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 leeks (white and green parts), cleaned and sliced
6 cups water or homemade chicken broth
2 zucchini, trimmed, seeded & cut into 1/2-inch half moons
1/2 pound green beans, cut into 1-inch lengths
1/2 cup orzo or other small shaped pasta
1 tablespoon each chopped parsley, mint and chives
Freshly grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
2. Add the leeks, cover, and cook for a couple of minutes until they begin to soften.
3. Add the garlic and cabbage; stir in 1 cup of water, then cook for 10 minutes or until the cabbage has wilted.
4. Stir in the remaining water, zucchini, and green beans; cover and simmer for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are somewhat tender.
5. Add the pasta; cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until the pasta is tender. If needed, add more water to maintain the liquid level.
6. Add the peas and cook for an additional minute to heat through.
7. Season carefully with salt and pepper.
8. Remove from heat; stir in the fresh herbs.
9. Serve with freshly grated Parmesan or Romano cheese and pesto or herb paste garnishes, as desired.
Yield: 4 servings
